headline: Chris chinks his glass while Henry and Jack take a knock
text: Colombia gave Christopher a tidy 3-1 win over Uzbekistan, and England had a lovely old laugh, 4-2 against Croatia, so Alex is purring. Ghana’s 1-0 squeak over Panama also helped Sara a touch. Meanwhile, Henry and Jack both had a bit of a rough one, with Croatia and Portugal failing to get the job done. At the top, Grandad still leads the lot on 7 points, with Nana and Christopher breathing down his neck on 6. At the other end, Sofia remains rooted to the bottom on 1 point. Not exactly champagne football, that.
